subgoals.description: Search for venues in Haymarket accommodating 12 people
subgoals.success_criterion: Venue search returns a list of candidate venues

subgoals.description: Select a venue from search results and calculate its cost to obtain deposit amount
subgoals.success_criterion: Deposit amount is successfully retrieved from calculate_cost tool

subgoals.description: Commit the booking using handoff_to_structured with all required parameters
subgoals.success_criterion: handoff_to_structured is called with venue_id, date, time, party_size, and deposit, and returns a successful booking confirmation
